title: sabulina uniflora
intro: Sabulina uniflora, also known as one-flowered sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sabulina uniflora include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion, often combined with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or ointment.
